metadata.description: Private GitHub Copilot plugin marketplace for development workflow skills

plugins.name: dev-workflows
plugins.description: Full product-development lifecycle for GitHub Copilot CLI. Nineteen user-facing skills covering the idea → create-vi → create-ard → specify → design → epics → implement → document → release-notes → ready flow, plus vuln (CVE remediation), upgrade (dependency upgrades), api-guideline-reviewer, guideline-reviewer, docs-profile, feedback, prompt, prompt-brainstorm, and prompt-grill-me. Flat keyword triggers (implement:, document:, epics:, specify:, design:, release-notes:, vuln:, upgrade:, idea:, create-vi:, create-ard:, ready:, feedback:, prompt:). Thirty dispatched sub-agents for planning, code review, doc review, testing, style-checking, and Jira/PR analysis. Strong-tier model routing (Opus 4.8/4.7/4.6 or GPT-5.5). Notification, context-injection, and dynatrace-docs frontmatter reminder hooks.

plugins.name: dt-style-guide
plugins.description: Dynatrace corporate style guide checker and writing-aid plugin. Enforces terminology, trademarks, voice/tone, grammar, formatting, and inclusive-language rules from styleguide.dynatrace.com. Includes dt-review-pr (review PR doc changes), dt-review-docs (review files/directories with optional --fix), dt-style-refresh (update vendored rules), a dt-style-rules skill, two dispatched sub-agents (dt-style-checker, dt-doc-fixer), and eight vendored reference docs. Acts as a fallback for dev-workflows when no repo-configured prose linter is available.

plugins.name: obsidian-llm-wiki
plugins.description: LLM Wiki pattern for an active Obsidian vault. Eleven skills (wiki-init, wiki-ingest, wiki-scan, wiki-query, wiki-save, wiki-lint, wiki-hot, wiki-tags-refresh, wiki-schema, wiki-task, wiki-tasks-extract) for ingesting, querying, saving, linting, and managing a persistent wiki compiled from meetings, projects, and daily notes. Includes task management: create individual tasks and batch-extract tasks from wiki content.
